summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow's new Contacts CRM and responsive design features. All backend APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend testing successful with complete CRUD workflow for contacts including job selection, contact creation, search functionality, and deletion. Responsive design working exactly as specified with sidebar auto-collapse below 900px and manual toggle functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks on close buttons and form submission buttons
ui_bugs.workaround: Use keyboard navigation (Escape key) or click outside modal to close

passed_tests: Backend: All 16 API endpoints working (auth, jobs CRUD, contacts CRUD, interview prep, AI endpoints)
Authentication: Session-based auth working correctly with test user creation
Contacts CRM: Empty state display with search bar and Add Contact button
Add Contact Modal: Opens with job selection dropdown, all form fields present and working
Contact Creation: Successfully creates contacts with job association and displays grouped by company
Contact Display: Beautiful card layout with avatars, role badges, email/LinkedIn links, notes, nudge badges
Search Functionality: Filters contacts by name, company, role type in real-time
Contact Deletion: Delete button removes contacts successfully
Job Enrichment: GET /contacts returns contacts with job_title, job_company, job_status
Responsive Design: Sidebar collapses to 56px below 900px width automatically
Manual Sidebar Toggle: Toggle button works correctly on desktop to collapse/expand sidebar
Dashboard: Shows proper empty state with clean design
Navigation: All navigation items working correctly (Board, ATS Checker, Dashboard, Contacts)
Layout System: Professional glassmorphic design with proper spacing and typography
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue with modal overlays)
